---
title: Brand 2
engine: jupyter
brand:
  color:
    palette:
      terracotta: "#c2704e"
      amber-glow: "#d4973b"
      olive-grove: "#6b7c3f"
      warm-umber: "#7a5c47"
      golden-wheat: "#c9a84c"
    background:
      dark: "#1e1714"
      light: "#faf6f2"
    foreground:
      dark: "#d4a87c"
      light: "#6b4733"
    dark:
      dark: "#1e1714"
      light: "#6b4733"
    light:
      dark: "#d4a87c"
      light: "#faf6f2"
  typography:
    fonts:
      - family: Playfair Display
        source: bunny
      - family: Lora
        source: bunny
      - family: Fira Code
        source: bunny
    base: Lora
    headings: Playfair Display
    monospace: Fira Code
---

{{< include /brands/_python.qmd >}}
